Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to act as the target LLM described in the prompt I need to analyze the provided event log data identify anomalies deviations from the Assumed Normal Process Flow hypothesize root causes and propose SQL queries to investigate further

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Normal Flow vs Actual Data

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Normal Flow 1 Register Order Sales 2 Perform Credit Check Finance 3 Validate Stock Warehouse 4 Confirm Shipment Logistics 5 Ship Goods Logistics 6 Issue Invoice Finance 7 Receive Payment Finance

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Missing Events No Perform Credit Check No Validate Stock Key Anomaly Missing Critical Activities Credit Check Stock Validation Payment before Invoice Shipment Confirmation says N but goods shipped anyway

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 1002 Priority Order orders table shows order_type priority Hypothesis Priority orders bypass standard checks Credit Stock to speed up delivery but process logging was not updated to reflect this approved fast track or the user ignored the workflow enforcement

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1003 Stock validation skipped before shipping Hypothesis Warehouse clerk error manual override system lag stock check recorded late or Confirm Shipment is actually a documentation step done after physical shipping

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 1004 Missing Credit Check and Stock Validation entirely Payment received before Invoice Hypothesis Pre paid order Cash on Delivery scenario not modeled in standard flow Or data entry error events not logged shipment_scheduled N but Ship Goods exists Data quality issue or process violation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Develop SQL Queries Need queries to 1 Detect sequence violations generally not just these 4 cases 2 Check for missing mandatory activities per case 3 Analyze Priority vs Standard behavior 4 Check resource compliance who did what 5 Analyze the additional_info flags attempted_early late_confirmation shipment_scheduled N
